zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast於1261年出生在波蘭盧貝爾斯吉武可福澤洛可姆拉波茲南時，她的父親Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland36歲，母親Jolenta Arpad27歲。她和Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1304年9月28日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉享年43歲，埋葬在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast于1261年出生在波兰盧貝爾斯吉武可福澤洛可姆拉波茲南时，她的父亲Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland36岁，母亲Jolenta Arpad27岁。她和Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica至少有3个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1304年9月28日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉享年43岁，埋葬在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Kalsz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: Sikh name based on the name of a Jat clan.

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the surname, derived from a medieval given name representing a Norman French alteration of the Old English personal name Wīgheard, from wīg ‘war’ + heard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast was born in 1261, in Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, Lublin, Poland, her father, Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland, was 36 and her mother, Jolenta Arpad, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica. She died on 28 September 1304, in Legnica, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 43, and was buried in Wrocław, Lower Silesia, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast est née en 1261, à Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Pologne, son père, Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jolenta Arpad, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica. Elle est décédée le 28 septembre 1304, à Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast 1261 in Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland 36 und ihre Mutter Jolenta Arpad 27. Sie hatte mit Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. September 1304 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Legnicki, Niederschlesien, Polen und wurde in Wrocław, Niederschlesien, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast è nata il nel 1261 nel Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polonia, sua padre, Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Jolenta Arpad, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica. Morì il 28 settembre 1304, nel Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth of Kalsz Piastが1261年にポーランドルベルスキlウクoウセロコムラポズナnで生まれた時，父Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Polandは36歳，母Jolenta Arpadは27歳であった。彼女はDuke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnicaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1304年9月28日にポーランドドルノsルaスキレグニクイで43歳で死去し，ポーランドドルノsルaスキウロクlアウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast(이)가 1261년 폴란드 루벨스키 lkow 서로코라 포즈나n에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jolenta Arpad(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 9월 28일 폴란드 도노sa스키 레그닉키에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 도노sa스키 록l아w에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast nasceu em 1261, em Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polônia, seu pai, Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jolenta Arpad, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica. Ela faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1304, em Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polônia, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast родилась в 1261 г. в местности познаn, сирокомла, lукoв, Люблінське, Польша, её отцу по имени Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jolenta Arpad, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica. Она умерла 28 сентября 1304 г. в местности легникки, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности рокlав, долноsлaски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast nació en 1261, en Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polonia, su papá, Boleslaw the Pious Duke of Greater Poland, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jolenta Arpad, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1304, en Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia.
